sounds.text: Short game sound effect: cleric marks an enemy with a radiant brand, warm golden flare, sacred chime, soft ember sizzle, clean fantasy SFX, no voice, no music.
Short game sound effect: protective cleric ward pulse expands outward, gentle holy shield bloom, warm whoosh, healing shimmer, clean fantasy SFX, no voice, no music.
Short game sound effect: cleric judgment strike detonates radiant magic, decisive holy impact, bright bell-like flash, low magical thump, clean fantasy SFX, no voice, no music.
